result.reason: Unhandled exception during application shutdown when multiple panels are open indicates a bug in resource disposal or event handling related to the docking framework.
result.approach: Investigate the shutdown sequence in FrmMain_FormClosing, focusing on the interaction with pnlDock and Runtime.WindowList to ensure proper disposal and event detachment of IDockContent elements to prevent race conditions or access to disposed objects.
